text: Standing here, I sense the intersection of innovation and contemplation. The clean openness of the first space invites introspection, while the vibrant, information-rich wall in the second scene stirs my curiosity. I feel like a wanderer between worlds—one silent and full of possibility, the other buzzing with questions and the search for understanding. It is invigorating and a little humbling to be among so many signals of human creativity and inquiry.
